title: nengella microcarpa
intro: Nengella microcarpa, also known as the 'Sarangani tree', is a plant species native to the Philippines. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Nengella microcarpa include the potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various types of infections, due to its high content of bioactive compounds. Herbal preparations of Nengella microcarpa are often used to create teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
